user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new employee joining task, so that onboarding steps are tracked for new hires
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Joining Checklist screen; When I click Add new employee joining task and enter the task name, responsible department and position level; Then the task is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to assign a responsible department and position level to each joining task, so that ownership of onboarding activities is clear
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating a joining task; When I set the responsible department and position level; Then the task is stored with those responsibilities

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view all joining tasks with their applicability, so that I can review the onboarding checklist
acceptance_criteria: Given joining tasks exist; When I open the list; Then each row shows Task name, Responsible department, Responsible position level and Applicability

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing joining task, so that I can update onboarding steps as processes change
acceptance_criteria: Given a joining task is listed; When I click Edit and change its details; Then the updated task is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through and refresh the joining tasks list, so that I can access all tasks and see the latest data
acceptance_criteria: Given more than one page of tasks exists; When I use pagination or click Refresh; Then the appropriate set of current tasks is displayed
